scope: Capture-scoped adaptive Huffman fixtures for protocol-91 final packet-byte comparison

huffman_scopes.length_prefix: two-byte big-endian uncompressed payload length at the compression offset
huffman_scopes.update_policy: Huff_transmit then Huff_addRef for each source byte
huffman_scopes.capture_compare_policy: compare every byte when encoded_bit_count_mod8 is non-zero; exact byte-aligned payloads need a captured terminal pad byte

huffman_scopes.state_model: MSG_initHuffman pre-seeds msgHuff.compressor and msgHuff.decompressor from msg_hData
huffman_scopes.update_policy: Huff_offsetTransmit/Huff_offsetReceive use the seeded tree and do not add per-symbol references after MSG_initHuffman
huffman_scopes.capture_compare_policy: fixture starts from a freshly initialized msgHuff seed and writes the listed byte sequence with 8-bit MSG_WriteBits calls

fixtures.description: Profile-91 connect OOB datagram with clear sentinel plus clear 'connect ' token and a Huff_Compress remainder starting at byte offset 12.
Small local-reset Huff_Compress fixture for the adaptive NYT path independent of OOB connect framing.
Fresh MSG_initHuffman seeded bitstream writing three MSG_WriteByte-compatible bytes.
Fresh seeded bitstream for the byte-aligned client-message body header plus sideband/move/EOF bytes before usercmd bitfields.

retail_anchors.observed: Seeds both msgHuff compressor and decompressor from msg_hData.
Uses Huff_offsetTransmit for non-OOB 8-bit chunks after any sub-byte prefix bits.
Builds a local NYT tree, writes the uncompressed size prefix, transmits each byte, and updates the local tree.
Writes the OOB sentinel, copies connect data, and calls Huff_Compress at offset 12.
Calls Huff_Decompress(msg, 12) only after the compressed-connect guard sees the clear connect token.

completion_status.implementation_plan_entry: Add capture-scoped adaptive Huffman fixtures for final packet-byte comparison
remaining_gaps: No committed external retail packet capture is available to compare these fixtures against.
Full snapshot/usercmd packet-byte replay still needs capture-specific message ordering and payloads.
The compressed-connect fixture is deterministic but still needs a retail trace before the compressed-connect capture-diff row can close.
